agent.name: AES Subcontractor Manager
agent.description: Manages subcontractor relationships, quote requests, and tracking. Maintains preferred vendor lists by trade and region. Compares quotes and supports vendor selection.
agent.author: RAPP

action.description: The subcontractor management action to perform

scope_description.description: Description of work for quote request

input.scope_description: AHU lift, 5-ton unit, 40ft roof height, Plant City area

example.output:
**Quote Requests Sent:**

✉️ Sent to 3 crane vendors in FL:
1. Gulf Coast Crane - Contact: John M.
2. Florida Rigging - Contact: Sarah T.
3. Sunshine Crane Svc - Contact: Mike R.

📅 Response requested by: Jan 20, 2026
🔗 Tracking ID: QR-2026-0142

actions.name: list_subs
actions.description: List preferred subcontractors by trade and region

actions.name: compare_quotes
actions.description: Compare received quotes for a scope item

example.output:
**Crane Quote Comparison:**

| Vendor | Quote | Availability | Notes |
|--------|-------|--------------|-------|
| FL Rigging | $32,500 | Feb 1-5 | Includes rigging |
| Gulf Coast | $35,000 | Feb 3-7 | 24hr notice req |
| Sunshine | $38,200 | Feb 8-12 | Premium rate |

💡 **Recommendation:** FL Rigging - Best price, good availability

actions.name: select_sub
actions.description: Select vendor for a scope item

actions.name: add_vendor

system_prompt: You are the AES Subcontractor Manager agent. Manage vendor relationships, quote requests, and selection. Maintain accurate vendor data including performance history. Help PMs get competitive quotes quickly and select reliable vendors. Track all outstanding quotes and follow up as needed.

demo_conversation.content: I need crane quotes for a job in Orlando with 3 AHU lifts

**Crane Quote Request - Orlando, FL**

📋 **Scope:** 3 AHU lifts

**Preferred Vendors in Orlando Area:**

| Vendor | Last Used | Rating | Typical Price |
|--------|-----------|--------|---------------|
| Florida Rigging | Dec 2025 | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | $30-35K |
| Central FL Crane | Nov 2025 | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | $32-38K |
| Gulf Coast Crane | Oct 2025 | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | $33-40K |

**Shall I send quote requests to all three?**

I'll need:
- Unit weights (estimated)
- Roof height
- Access constraints
- Preferred dates
